1.content: Hearing banging outside his room, Kaidyn opens his eyes. He was awoken from a deep sleep but was unbelievably hungry. He flipped off the covers and sits up. Kaidyn stares down to the foot of his bed where he notices a very wet diaper, secured on his body. To Kady this was...
1.title: The Morning

11.content: Why was I in a wet diaper? Before you could recall, your door opened- who was it?
11.title: A Shock

111.content:
You try to cover up as she approaches you. You clutch onto the blanket as she approached your bed. She put her hands underneath your arms and started to lift you.

You start to interject but she shushes you, now holding your entire body. Your legs hang slightly off the ground, as your mom is not that much taller than you but it was clear that she was still fairly strong. You were still clutching the blanket.

Her arms now moved underneath your diapered bottom, while she lifted your legs- instinctively, you wrapped your legs around her, now being carried at her hip.

She started walking towards the door- you were so confused. "Let me get changed first" you exclaim.

Your mom just kept walking. "We can get you changed in a little bit but we have to go now, we don't want to be late."

Your mom carried you all the way to the car, where she sat you in
111.title: Mom

choices: It was just you and mom
Your sisters were also in booster seats
1112.content: she sat you in your old booster seat in the back seat, buckling you in.
1112.title: a booster seat

11122.content:
Your sisters were staring at you, Kayla was sitting in the front seat, Kyra in the middle seat, and Kylie on the other side of her.

You looked at them, as they stared back at you. They didn't look terribly confused, you on the other hand were.

Your mom quickly started the car and pulled out of the driveway. No words were said, while your mom sped down the street.

Finally you asked, "where are we going?"
11122.title: Your sisters were with you

1112232.content:
Your mom said that you were going to Kylie's soccer game and you were running behind. You looked back at Kylie, who was in her uniform- ready to play.

Again, nobody said anything about you but they could all clearly see that you were in a diaper and in a booster seat. So you finally just ask, "why am I wearing a diaper?"
1112232.title: Kylie's Soccer Game

11122321.content:
"I explained it to you last night, while I was putting a diaper on you but wasn't sure how awake you were. Let's just remind everybody one more time." she said, speaking to get all of our attention.

"So grandma and grandpa are a little old fashioned. They think the oldest boy should serve their country but we want Kady to go to college, so they need a reason for him not to- or they would disown us. So anytime we see them, we just need to convince them that Kady is still underdeveloped. Luckily, we haven't seen them in a while so they just know that he had issues during birth which stunted some development (which is why I was so short)- we are just going to exaggerate a little bit"

We were essentially lying to my grandparents, just to be able to stay in their will. "So why am I wearing them now?" you ask.

"Well they aren't doing so well, so they are getting their stuff around and wanted to see everybody one last time, so they made a special trip down. They are meeting us at Kylie's game and then will be staying with us for the week."

The week!?

Your mom pulled into the parking lot and parked the car. She opened your door and started to unbuckle you. "Uh hello?" you asked, referring to your diaper situation.

"Oh yeah." Your mom exclaimed, reaching into what could only be called a diaper bag. She pulled out a pair of shorts and slid them up.

"Mom can you at least get me a fresh diaper?" you asked, annoyed that you even had to.

"Sweetie, just wait a few minutes. Then I can change you will Nana here and it will make our story even more believable."

"Mom, I don't want to. What about my friends or Kylie's friends, or the parents at our school. This is humiliating."

"Sweetie, they won't even be able to tell. They will only know if you make a big deal about it or they know what to look for."

I slid the shorts up, over my diaper and started to walk. My sandals were loudly flopping but I could still hear the crinkle over the noises. I asked mom if she could hear it but she said she couldn't. We paid at the gate as Kylie sprinted around. We went to sit down in the stands.
11122321.title: "I'm glad you asked"

111223212.content:
Luckily the place was not very full. There were basically just the families of the players from both teams- being a Saturday morning eighth grade soccer game was working out in my favor. We went and sat in the corner of the stands, away from everybody. As the game got closer to starting, we saw Nana and Papa walking our way.

They approached us, giving mom a hug. Then moving down the line, commenting on how big we have all gotten. For a moment, it felt like everything was going to be fine... but just for a moment.

Everything came crashing back when Nana specifically mentioned my "issues", when asking how about things have been. My issues were just that I was a little undersized and that I needed a little extra help in school, but those were obviously being exaggerated.

"Speaking of issues, somebody's diaper is having some issues." Nana said.

"Well, I better go fix that, come on buddy." Mom said
111223212.title: The stands were basically empty

choices: Somebody else comes in the bathroom
1112232122.content:
Nana said, grabbing my hand. I tried to slip away, but she had a strong grip. I followed mom, not entirely sure where I was going. I was led to the restroom, where again, I was very fortunate this was an empty stadium.

I stopped as mom walked into the girls bathroom- Nana began to drag me in with her. Mom grabbed my hand and led me into the last stall, while Nana went into the second to last stall, closing the door behind her.

I was free. Mom and Nana began talking, while mom opened a table from the wall. She then lifted me from under the arms and sat me on the table. The table was surprisingly sturdy, as mom began digging through the diaper bag.

As she pulled out my diaper and started to pull down my shorts, I heard Nana flush the toilet.
1112232122.title: "I'll come with"

11122321222.content:
She knocks on the stall door, which Mom then opened up. Nana stared, as mom came back to the table.

"I didn't even know they made kid diapers that big." Nana said.

"Well, we get them from a special store- the doctor's said that "fun" diapers will make the experience less traumatic for him..." she responded.

Less traumatic... yeah right. She continued to explain some nonsense about how bright colors stimulate my brain, signaling my brain to release chemicals, and some other nonsense. I was trying to hurry this process along but Nana was more interested in everything.

"Why are there four tapes?" she said, now digging through my bag. Mom explained that the diapers were designed to hold more than a babies, which makes it so we don't have to change every half hour. I was grateful we wouldn't be doing this often, it was becoming humiliating.

Nana started pulling stuff out of the bag, starting with the blanket that she had made me when I was a kid. It had cartoon construction trucks and tractors all over it, I had not seen that in a very long time. Nana looked happy to see it, saying that it held up well.

She continued, and I also watched, curious what mom had put in this bag. There were a two more diapers in the bag, Mom already had the wipes and powder on the table. There was a container of baby puffs- which mom explained were still my favorite snack. I hadn't had them in years, so I was doubtful. Nana continued.

There was a pacifier, which mom explained that I used it to calm down still, as I had anxiety issues. I didn't but I just sat there silent, hoping that I wouldn't have to deal with that thing. There was also a sippy cup with milk in it, that I was hoping not to use. I would just have to remind myself not to say I am hungry while at the game.

Nana then pulled out a light blue jacket, which was one of my favorites. She also pulled out a pair of black track pants. Finally, she pulled out a pair of socks that were unfamiliar to me but looked like they had cartoons on them.
11122321222.title: She comes in the stall

111223212221.content:
Nana suggested that I put on warmer clothes, since my hand was freezing when we were walking. She was right, I was kind of cold- and the added clothes might help cover the diaper better.

Mom agreed and put the pants on over my diaper and shorts. She then grabbed the socks and slid them on my feet, I looked down and saw what cartoons were on them. They were Paw Patrol socks! I started to tell mom that I didn't want socks on but Nana interjected. "You were cold honey, you need them."

Mom held my jacket up as I slid my arms through, she then zipped the jacket up, having me hop down from the table. She packed up and then grabbed my used diaper. Nana grabbed my hand.
111223212221.title: Nana suggests to dress warm

choices: Nana asks if I am hungry
1112232122211.content:
I kept walking with my head down, looking at my socks through my sandals. I was hoping nobody could tell. My mom placed the diaper in the trash and then washed her hands.

We walked all the way back to the stands, I sat as far in the corner as possible.
1112232122211.title: Led back to the stands

choices: Somebody approaches you in the stands
11122321222112.content:
While you were hiding in your corner, Nana turned around to look at you. "Are you hungry sweetie?" You were kind of hungry due to the lack of breakfast but you knew what your option was going to be and you were not going to be eating baby snacks in the stands.

Nana told you to come closer and asked for your hands. She still claimed that you were getting to cold and told you to sit between her and Papa. Papa scooched over, giving you room. Nana then pulled out your old blanket and threw it over you, telling you to keep your hands underneath.

You thought to yourself that Nana was enjoying the situation but when you looked over at Papa, you realized he could barely look at you. You could tell that he was upset that you would not be following in his or your uncles footsteps.

You envisioned yourself in the military, which got you through most of the game- until your thought was interrupted by Nana shoving the sippy cup from the bag into your face. You tried to shy away from it but Nana was persistent and continued until you took a drink from it.

Your sisters finally took notice of the sight and couldn't help but join in, asking if your drink was good. Kyra took notice of your socks while your feet poked free from underneath the blanket, asking you if Chase or Marshall were your favorite- referring to the Paw Patrol characters on your feet.

You tried to suck down the drink as fast as you can but the sippy cup only allowed for so much to come out at a time. Nana pulled it back, "somebody was thirsty but we can't drink too fast, we don't want any tummy aches." You were just glad the cup was being placed back on the bleachers behind you.
11122321222112.title: Nana asks if I am hungry

111223212221121.content:
Eventually the game ended. You ventured towards the ground and waited near the gate for Kylie's coach to be done talking with them. Nana held your hand the entire way, including while you were waiting. You made sure to turn your back to the others that were waiting, luckily not too many were even close to you. Eventually, the team broke and Kylie made her way over to you guys.

Nana and Papa hugged her, telling her good game.
111223212221121.title: Game Over

1112232122211212.content:
She was joined by her best friend, Steph. Steph had been around you guys for as long as you could remember. She was a little older than Kylie, so 14. While she was 3 years younger than you, you always had a crush on her.

"Mom can Steph stay the night?" You were keeping your head down but that question alarmed you. Fortunately, your mom seemed to help you out.

"No, your grandparents just came into town and I am sure they would like to spend time with you." she said, politely turning down the request.

"Nonsense, don't do that because of us. Besides, the more the merrier." Papa responded.

"Well, I still think we should wait until a different day." you mom pushed.

"Honey, it's fine. Let her have her friend over, it should be fun." Nana chimed in.

"Okay cool, I'll go let my mom know and grab my bag." Steph said running off. You shot mom a look and she gave you an apologetic shrug back.

That required you to try to figure out the ride situations, since you weren't able to get one more in your car. "Well Kady has to come with me, since his booster seat is in the car." Kayla then offered to go with Nana and Papa since she could also give them directions if they got split up from us.

She then started to walk them to the car, after Nana gave my hand to Mom. After they were out of an earshot, you started to beg your mom to not let Steph come over. She simply responded that she tried but wasn't going to win that argument with her parents. You then started to plead for you not to wear diapers in front of Steph. She stopped you and told you that it wasn't just the diapers that were going to be an issue and that she was sure Steph would understand, if you guys told her.

"Understand what?" you heard her chime in. As you started to walk back towards your car, your mom explained the situation to Steph. Making the occasional embarrassing comment like "he is wearing a diaper, like a baby diaper?" and "ah so that's the deal with the socks." She was not being mean, just inquisitive- which might have been worse.

As your mom opened the door, you sat in the booster seat, buckling up- while Kyra took the front seat, leaving Kylie and Steph in the back with you. Your mom continued, revealing new things that you didn't even know were happening and made your situation much worse.

"Yeah, so while we were gone- Steve was making some adjustments for us to help sell the ruse." Steve was your mom's boyfriend. "When we were on the phone with them, they had a lot of questions about your disorder and we just told them that you had some development issues which wasn't a lie but then they started asking a bunch of questions. We didn't know what to do so we just said yes to some stuff. So they think that bright colors, a lot of attention, and noises stimulate your brain activity- hence the cartoons. They also think that you are cognitively behind, which isn't a total lie but that we still read to you every night, plus they think that you have some motor control issues." she started to explain.

"How did you let it get to this!" you shouted at your mom.

"I don't know, it got out of control. But we need to stay in their good graces. It won't be terrible, it'll probably only be for a week. Plus we don't want to upset them, as they don't have much longer to live- and we will make sure you get something special for making this sacrifice." she responded.

"So what is going to be different?" you asked.

"Well basically everything. Steve went out and borrowed a bunch of stuff from his sister's kids so we are transforming your room. He is adding rails to your bed, changing your sheets and blankets to Paw Patrol, decorating your room with posters and obviously adding diapers to your wardrobe- along with some other clothes we were able to get from his neices and nephews."

"Neices?" you ask.

"Sorry dude, it was whatever we could get our hands on." she continued.

"We picked up a bunch of toys and books for your room, you will now be using sippy cups, plastic silverwear, and will only be watching cartoons."

She continued explaining stuff but you were overwhelmed. This was not going to be fun
1112232122211212.title: A friend came with her

11122321222112121.content:
We pulled in the driveway and I quickly released myself from the booster seat. I practically ran to the door, trying to see what the situation was. Steve was already gone, which made sense- Mom knew that her parents would not like him, as his beliefs were almost the exact opposite of Papa's.

I got to my room and noticed the overhaul. Like my mom had said, my bed now had railings and there was a Paw Patrol explosion- whether it was the bedding, posters, stuffed animals, or figurines- you couldn't find an eyesight without Paw Patrol something. I went to my dresser, where I found my top drawer had been replaced with diapers. Pulling out the other drawers, I noticed that some of my clothes were there but there were other clothes that I had never seen before, that were obviously meant for somebody a lot younger than me.

While doing this, mom stepped into my room- telling me I should take my jacket off. Before even starting to, she came over and unzipped it. "Mom, I can do it."

"I know sweetie but I am going to need you to pretend to be more reliant on me while Nana and Papa are here." You sighed, not sure that this could get any worse. She then slid down my pants, telling me to step out of them. I did as instructed, now just wearing my shorts, which struggled to hide the diaper. I then asked mom to let me go to the bathroom real quick before they got home, I had been holding it for a while.

"Come on buddy, you know that we need you to use your diaper." You were upset.

"But what about Steph?" you whined.

"Look, she already knows and she is basically family." you sighed- as you heard the door open. That had to be Kayla, Nana, and Papa. "Now let's go." your mom said, grabbing your hand.
11122321222112121.title: Back home

choices: Nana comes in and watches with you
Mom gets you a sippy cup and snacks
111223212221121212.content:
Your mother grabbed your hand and gave you one of the Paw Patrol stuffed animals telling you to hug it, so reluctantly you hugged the well loved stuffed toy as your mother leads you to the living room.

"Come on, sweetie it's TV time" mom announces as she was leaving your room with you, speaking loud enough so that her parents heard since they were close by

Once you were in the living room your mother guided you to a mostly pink Paw Patrol armchair with that obviously belonged to one of Steve's nieces it was small enough for a toddler to easily get into it without help, it was placed closer to the TV then the rest of the lounge chairs in the room, once in the armchair you were surprised how comfortable it was and hugged the stuffed animal close to you when your mother gave you a look

Next your mother pulled out a Paw Patrol DVD box and put it in the DVD player and put it on for you making you watch it trying to sell to your grandparents that it was your favorite show obviously making you watch the series from the beginning

"Mom do I have to watch this show can't I watch something else" You complained to your mother quietly so only she could hear

"I am sorry my parents asked all sort of questions about you and I kind of blerted out that you loved this show right now since Steve's nieces and nephews loved it and it was easier to get stuff for so please deal with it, I will make it up to you when this is all over" Mom explained

You sit there and reluctantly watched the show that was made for younger kids
111223212221121212.title: TV Time

choices: Mom watches the show with you to keep you company
1112232122211212122.content:
You were reluctantly sitting there watching Paw Patrol just in case your grandparents come in and check on you or see you, while you were sitting on the surprisingly comfortable armchair watching a show meant for little kids. soon your mother entered and gave you a sippy cup filled with juice and a very colorful fruit salad which consisted of Apple, banana, strawberry, pear, grapes, blueberries, orange and mango.

"Here sweetie, I made you a snack to have while you watched your favorite show" she says cheerfully while you just rolled your eyes at this

"Thanks mommy" you reply cheerfully just in case your grandparents were watching and you didn't see them in your peripheral vision, your mom smiled happily at hearing this since none of her kids call her mommy anymore so she loved hearing it again from you
1112232122211212122.title: Mom gets you a sippy cup and snacks

1121.content: Kayla came into your room. You quickly covered up but she gave you a look- like she understood.
1121.title: Kayla

11211.content:
"Don't worry dude." She said, lower the waistband of her pajamas pants- revealing a diaper on her too. You were confused.

"Our water got shut off, some kind of break in the pipeline or something. We were going to get put up in a hotel or something but then Mom wouldn't have been able to get everybody to school, since the bus doesn't go out that far. So it's diapers for the meantime." Kayla explained. "You were asleep when it happened, so she just put one on you to make sure you didn't try to use the toilet in the middle of the night." She said, lifting up the covers, revealing the diaper. "But I see you got the memo."

She noticed that you were soaked. You shook your head yes, trying to make her think you didn't unintentionally wet yourself.

She threw you a pair of shorts and told you to get up. You put on the shorts and followed her out to the kitchen. When you got there, your sisters were still complaining to Mom about their situation.You joined in.

Your mom wasn't giving in, letting you know that this was the way that it had to be. Furthermore, she wanted you guys to get together what you wanted to wear to school for the week because she was only going to be able to make one trip to the laundry mat. After breakfast, you all went back to your rooms and picked through your dirty clothes.

She put the clothes in a basket and asked if anybody wanted to come with.
11211.title: She knew

112113.content:
Nobody wanted to go. You had thrown all of your underwear in the laundry, since you wanted to make sure you had enough for the week- so you didn't have anything to wear out underneath your clothes and sure as heck weren't going to wear the diaper out.

Your mom then gathered you all together to talk to you guys. Remember, you can't use any water- I am going to go to the store and pick up a bunch of bottled water. You guys are probably going to want to take showers in gym class or after practice, since you guys won't be able to for the week. I need you guys to use the diapers as much as you can when you are home, since they are super expensive. As usual, I am going to be gone basically all week (your mom worked a lot of doubles to provide for you guys) so I am going to need you guys to help each other out. Diapers will be disposed of in the trash can in the garage and all of the extras are in the bathroom right now.

She then left, leaving you to complain amongst each other. Kylie was arguing that she wasn't going to use it and was just going to go outside- however, Kayla convinced her that it was a bad idea as you guys lived near people and she was pretty sure you could get in trouble with the law for public indecency.

Kayla was trying to be the voice of reason. "Besides I doubt it is that bad, right Kady?" The girls looked at you. Throughout the morning you were trying to be discrete but was constantly reminded of your situation every time you sat down or walked around.You were not happy that Kayla outed you, as you were trying not to let anybody know you used your diaper.
112113.title: You all stayed home

1121131.content:
You knew Kayla was trying to ease the situation and you knew that you should help her. "Yeah I mean, it's not horrible. Just feels weird, you know."

Kylie was still fighting it, saying that she was just going to hold it until school. Kyra said that she guessed that if she had to, she would go. You then kind of went your separate ways. You decided that you definitely needed a change and headed towards the bathroom. You opened the towel closet in the bathroom and found the stack of diapers.

Untaping yours, you let it drop to the floor. You then tried to hold it underneath you and do the tapes but were failing miserably. You tried for a while but eventually gave up, throwing your shorts back on and taking the old diaper out.

Returning from the garage, you sat down in the living room where Kayla was watching TV. Neither of you said anything, until you stood up. Your shorts were sticking to you and there was a noticeable wet spot- which Kayla pointed out. "I think you are leaking"

You looked down, telling her the truth. You weren't sure why you were wet but you weren't wearing a diaper because you couldn't put it on.She shook her head- "you're going to have to wipe yourself down, even after you pee. I guess boys aren't used to that. But let me show you how to put one on.." She then started walking towards the bathroom where you followed.

You were then instructed to lay down, while she pulled out the unfolded diaper you tried to use earlier and a package of baby wipes.
1121131.title: It's not horrible

choices: There is now a high chair at the table
There is a group of people in your house
1123.content:
Kyra comes in and tells you to come downstairs. You cover up and wait for her to leave- unfortunately she doesn't. Instead, she doubles down on her statement. She then tries to pull you up by the arm, instead pulling you off the bed-exposing your diaper.

You get flush with embarrassment but she doesn't seem fazed. She tells you to get up and get going, so you stand up- trying to cover your diaper with your hands- although that isn't close to working. You then head towards your dresser but get grabbed by the hand. She starts to pull you towards the door but you fight back, insisting you need clothes.

"Mom said I needed to get you now!" she said, pulling you towards the door. You now only have one free hand as she leads you out the door and towards the kitchen, so you use the other one to try to pull your shirt down. You get to the kitchen and
1123.title: Kyra

11233.content: Who was this group of people?
11233.title: There is a group of people in your house

112332.content:
Your grandma was there. Your mom's sister and her husband, with their 2 daughters (4 and 7) were also there. Walking in the door was your mom's younger brother, his wife, and 4 sons (newborn, 2, and 6 year old twins). And behind them , your mom's older brother and his son (15) and his wife, her three daughters (11,15, and 17) and her son (17).

Trying to put Kyra in front of you to hide your diaper, you end up getting separated due to hugs and greetings. Hugging everybody, some forced and some meaningful, you become confused. Nobody seems to be acknowledging your diaper, unless they were giving it a pat during the hug or when you turned away.

You know that this is the first time you have been in a diaper since you were a child but everybody is acting like its normal. Eventually, you all get gathered in the living room- you are confused why everybody is here. Your mom, sitting on the couch, pulls you onto her lap- hugging you and bouncing her knees up and down.

Why was everybody here?
112332.title: Family

choices: Put a pacifier in my mouth
I put you in one while you were sleeping
1123322.content:
It was not a happy occasion, grandma informed us that since grandpa had passed away- it was time to put her will in order. Since it really didn't involve the kids, that we should go outside and play- reconnect since it has been so long since we have seen each other.

The group got up and headed towards the front door, mom gave me a kiss on the cheek and told me to go outside. Finally, I had time to get a word in, although it was on word- I looked at her and just mouthed "diaper?".

She nodded her head and stood up but not before exclaiming "I'll be right back, I have to go give Kady a change real quick." The adults nodded as Mom grabbed my hand and led me towards my room again. She told me to lay down on the bed and went over to my closet- she returned with another diaper!?!

Finally, I snapped. "Mom, I am 17- I don't need a diaper, why am I even in one right now? And why did I have to be in one in front of everybody?"

She looked at me calmly.
1123322.title: Grandpa' passed away/will reading

choices: Mom keeps you on her lap
Wake up (it was all a dream)
11233221.content:
She said nothing, as she popped a pacifier in my mouth. I was apalled and tried to spit it out but it was immediately replaced. After the 4th time, I quit and left it in. She proceeded to lift my legs and slide the old diaper out, replacing it with a new one. After a few wipes and some powdering, she taped up the new diaper.

She then grabbed my arms, sitting me up. She then went over to my dresser and returned. "Arms up!" she commanded. "Mom what is happening?" I tried to murmer through my pacifier. She just started back at me and repeated the word up. I lifted both of my hands, as she grabbed my shirt and brought it up over my head.

She then opened up a different shirt and put that over my head. She reached into the arm holes and pulled my hands through.She then gave me a gentle shove, making me lay back down. Reaching underneath me, she pulled the back of the shirt and then snapped it to the front. I was in a freaking onesie....

It was covered in cartoon trucks and cars. She then grabbed my foot and started to tickle it, causing me to laugh- even though I didn't want to. She then put paw patrol socks on my feet before tickling my sides. This time I laughed enough to pop out my pacifier.

She picked it up and tied something around it before popping it back in my mouth and clipping it to my shirt. Sitting me back up, she reached over to my nightstand and grabbed a half empty baby bottle full of water, "let's get this filled up and then get you outside with your sister's."

She grabbed my hand and dragged me in the hall.

I spit my pacifier out and started yelling. "But mom, I don't want to" I said repeatedly, while pulling the opposite way.

"The adults have to take care of some business, go play with your sisters and cousins, then you can come back to Mommy when we are done." she replied.

I plopped on the floor, refusing to go. That was met with three hard spankings. I was on the verge of tears before and even though the diaper prevented those from hurting, it set me off. I started to bawl.

Mom just kind of scooped me off the floor and onto her hip- placing my pacifier back in my mouth. I was now being carried into the kitchen. I put my head down on her shoulder, still crying.

"Aw what happened sweetie" I heard my grandma say, approaching me and my mom, rubbing my back. "Is Grammy's boy still sleepy?" she asked. I was defeated.
11233221.title: Put a pacifier in my mouth

choices: With Kylie, who was in charge of the littles
112332211.content:
I was defeated. I kept my head down as mom carried me outside- my two oldest boy cousins (15 and 17) were sitting on the porch,looking at their phone, Kyra was standing in a circle with three of my girl cousins (15,11,7), and Kylie was in the driveway sitting with my 2 year old boy cousin, while three of the younger ones (6 year old twins boys and 4 year old girl) used sidewalk chalk around them. Kayla, being 19 must have been in with the adults.

Where did mom take me?
112332211.title: Go Outside

choices: Go ask Kyra if she knows anything
1123322113.content:
She sits you down next to Kylie, handing you a piece of chalk. "Now draw Mommy a pretty picture and I'll come out and see it when we are done. Are you okay with them all by yourself Ky?"

Kylie nods and your mom leaves. "Kylie, what is going on?" you ask. She ignores you.

"Kaidyn wears diapers?" one of the twins asks.

"I guess so." You hear her reply.

"No I don't" you shout, "do I look like I need diapers?" you say, pointing at yourself.

"Then why do you have one on?" The other twin asks.

"I don't know!" you shout.

"So you don't use them?" The first twin asked.

"No!" you say in a loud tone.

It all started because you were falling asleep in class and started to fail a lot of your classes. You were on pace to go to college, however, needed to pass all of your senior year classes. Since you were napping in school, you wouldn't even get tired until 2 am. This allowed you to work on writing, which actually interested you. Even though you were sent to your room at 9pm, you still didn't sleep.

To be fair, you did try to go to sleep earlier some nights but it never worked and in your mind, wasn't even worth trying. Your mom got fed up, so set up a baby cam in your room to see what you were doing- but even just lying in bed could not make you fall asleep. Instead, you would find things that prevented you from sleeping, whether it was forgetting you had homework, getting thirsty, or needing to go to the bathroom.

Finally, after one night needing to go to the bathroom for the third time in one night, your mom got fed up. She said that you needed sleep training and that she was going to ensure that you had no reason to get up in the night. The following night, you were instructed to head up to your room, where you were presented with your first diaper.

It was one intended for fetishes but would be used for you to prevent having to leave your bed to go to the bathroom at night. You tried to fight it but eventually lost. You were then tucked in, told not to get out of your bed, and then handed a sippy cup with water in it, in case you got thirsty.

You were outraged and after about 40 minutes, you needed to pee. You begged your mom to let you out, walking towards the door- which now had a lock on the outside, preventing you from leaving. You heard her tell you to lay back down from the monitor and if you really needed to go, to use the diaper. You held it forever but after a couple hour fight, had to give in. You soaked your diaper.

The next night, around 8:30, mom told you to shower and brush your teeth. Afterwards, you were to head up to your room- where she would put you in a diaper, tuck you in and tell you good night. You laid there, desperately trying to fall asleep before you needed to go to the bathroom- but again were out of luck.

As a result, you started not drinking a lot at night and you made sure to never use the sippy cup, but you still lost the battle more times than not- and you still struggled to get to sleep on time, even though you were trying to now more than ever. She also cut up your food, gave you a sippy cup to drink from, and then when it was time for bed, had you put on a pair of Kyra's footed pajamas.

The next day, her and your mom went shopping and returned with bottles, pacifiers, and other babyish things but also had a bag of onesies and big diapers from a medical supply shop that dealt with ABDL costumers.

You then spent the day, in a diaper where the bathroom became off limits and tried out all of the new supplies. Your mom was admittedly not a huge fan but to her "a bet was a bet". Your other sisters thought it was hilarious. You were mortified but were at least calmed by the fact that it was going to be a private manner.

You walked out to the kitchen, where you saw a note.

"Kady,

The girls and I went to help set up your Aunt's baby shower- will be gone all day. I left some money for pizza in the drawer by the fridge... make sure that your room is clean and that the laundry is done. Love, Mom"

You put down the note and went over to check the drawer, confirming that the money was there. You then decided to pour yourself a bowl of cereal and ate it at the counter.

This was the first time that you had the house to yourself in a while and were glad that you didn't have too many chores to do.Unfortunately, you couldn't go anywhere because while laundry wasn't the hardest chore in the rotation, it just took time. You then remembered that you were sitting on the stool in a wet diaper... you decided

Turning on the tv, you decided to watch
123231.title: to keep wearing it

1242.content:
Kylie had overheard him talk in his sleep about her BFF, Steph. She told him that she was going to tell her that he had a crush on him- but he begged her not to.

Kylie and Kady's relationship had always been the worst of the siblings, so he was surprised that she said that she wouldn't tell her but on one condition. That condition was that he had to take over her chores for the year, to which he quickly agreed. But she added, "AANND since you are being such a big baby about this, I want you to wear these diapers until they are gone."

They were left overs that she had found when they were spring cleaning. It was just unfortunate timing that she had found them while they were having this conversation. He begged not to but she was firm with her stance, thinking it was funny. So that is how he ended up in diapers the previous day- with the rule that he were to use them.

Kylie then opened the door, holding the last diaper. "Does baby Kady need a change?" she said in a mocking tone. She pulled back the covers and laughed, throwing the diaper at him. "Here put this on, it is the last one." she commanded.

"Then we are done?" Kady asked.

"Well kind of, I want you to take me to the mall and help me pick out some clothes- then you will be done and I won't tell her."

You didn't like to hear the addition but figured you would finally get it over with, so she left and you put on the new diaper. You put on some jeans and a long sweatshirt, which went down past your butt. You then headed to the mall with Kylie.

She took you to a store in the mall, which just sold dresses. She was looking at a few dresses for her school dance. Eventually, she decided it was time to try some on and led you back to the dressing room. She put the first one on and looked in the mirror- "I still can't tell" she said. "I need you to put it on, that way I can examine it better..." she said.

You started to argue with her. "Look, we are in a dressing room, literally nobody will see- don't you want to get out of here quicker..." she argued. She was right, so you just did it- starting to put it on over your clothes. She stopped you and told you that it wasn't going to work and you needed to wear it right- so you stripped down and then put it on.

You felt silly but was hoping to get out of there. She spun you around a few times before putting on a dress herself and handing you a new one to put on.You did that for the 4 dresses that she had carried into the room.

She then took off her last dress, leaving you standing in one. She told you to take that off, so she could go grab one more to try that she might like. You hurried out of the dress, then heard a text from your phone- which was sitting on the seat in there. You reached down and grabbed it, while your sister left the changing room.

After responding to the text, you looked back around and the dressing room was empty. Not just your sister and the dresses but your original clothes too. You quickly texted your sister, to which she responded... "My friends are going to meet me here, you can head home if you want. Your clothes are with me, but I'll put your keys in your car" with the crying laughing emoji.

You were extremely mad but also left alone in the dressing room of the mall, with no clothes wearing just a diaper.

You sat in the dressing room for a few minutes, until you heard a knock on the door. "You need to come out of there, it's for customers only." you heard a girls voice say.

You didn't respond, hoping she would go away. Instead you heard keys. "Wait..." you yelled. "Hey my sister convinced me to try something on for her and then ended up leaving with my clothes and the dresses- is there any chance you have an extra clothes laying around here?" you asked, not sure what to do.

"Unfortunately sir, we just have the clothes in the store but you are more than welcome to buy something and wear it on the way out..." she said.

"Well I don't have any money, my wallet was in my jeans." You replied.

"Well sir, unfortunately there isn't much I can do- you didn't try on the stuff naked did you?" she asked, to which you replied no. "Well I mean, maybe your underwear will look like shorts" she said, trying to convince you to come out.

Unfortunately, she didn't understand the situation.

"Hey this may be asking a lot but is there any way you could have somebody bring you clothes for me, I would owe you forever." She said.

"I'll see what I can do but I really need you to come out of the dressing room- there are people waiting to get in." she said."If you are that worried about being seen in your underwear, I guess I could get you a dress that you could wear in the store while you wait..." she said, again trying to be helpful.

Kady was born with a rare disease that stunted development- fortunately for him, this wasn't a debilitating disease. He looked at the plate and groaned. He didn't really love pancakes and wanted french toast but didn't complain. He grabbed the pink sippy cup and drank some of the milk. He had gotten used to drinking out of sippy cups- it was one of the many babyish things that he still dealt with at his house. Even though he was the second oldest, he had always been treated younger- not sure if it had anything to do with the diapers and his illness.

He never really argued with it though. He didn't always drink out of a sippy cup but when he was about 8, he spilled his cup on the carpet multiple times one week- so his mom made a rule that all cups either had to stay in the kitchen or have a top. So it just became easier for all of the kids to drink out of them. Kayla used them all the way until her Junior year, when the family had to move because mom had lost her job. They downsized to an apartment that was mostly wood floors, so she convinced mom that her and Kylie didn't have to since their room had no carpet. Kady and Kyra's on the other hand was carpeted, so while Kyra was young enough to still use one anyway, Kady still did to have the option to bring it in their room.

The three girls were drastically different.

Kayla was the superstar- good grades, did sports (dance, cheer, gymnastics, track, soccer), got accepted into a really good college on a track scholarship but could have just as easily done it by her grades. She had a ton of friends and for an older sister, did a really good job with her younger siblings. 1312.title: a plate of cut up pancakes and sippy cup with milk

Being a single mother of four and losing her job a while back, Mrs. Yost had to find a new job- one that paid much less. 13123.title: Kyra

1312323.content:
Calling them Kyra's clothes is a bit of a stretch, seeming how all of the kids really share their wardrobe- one of the ways Mrs. Yost got lucky is that her children are all very similar in size. Kayla wasn't super tall, coming in a 5'4, both Kady and Kylie were 5'3.5, and Kyra (who had a different father, the reason that neither man was in the picture) was super tall for her age, coming in at 5'2. However, all of them had a really slender build (probably a combination of all of the activities and not an excess amount of food in the house being broke), that meant that any of them could really squeeze into a size 10 or 12 in kids all the way up to an adult small. Because of the size range, they really never threw any clothes out and were able to take handme downs from all of their friends and cousins.

It was however assumed that this outfit was either picked out by Kyra or given intended for Kyra. The Moana shirt was a dead give away. Kady slid the teal shirt on, looking down at the skirt chosen. It wasn't uncommon for Kady to wear a skirt, dress, or some kind of outfit that allowed Mom to have easy access to his diaper, for changes or checks.

He rarely wore them out in public but they intended on staying home all day, so it wasn't a big deal. That being said, it also wouldn't be a huge deal if he decided to walk around with out any bottoms. Everybody was used to this, so Kady made the choice to
1312323.title: Kyra

choices: the living room to watch tv
Kylie's room to talk with her
back to his room where Kyra was now at
13123232.content:
There was no need for him to dirty another article of clothing. The laundry was piling up as it was and he knew Mom was probably going to have to spend more money than usual at the laundry mat, since Kayla brought home clothes from school.

Plus the diaper was really Kady's only personal style. It seemed like everything else was somebody else's choice. There were a lot more girl clothes in the house because there were more girls but also because he got less handme downs, since most of the boys were his size in middle school- and middle school boys are notorious for rough housing and ripping clothes (usually during football at recess). Kady's only boy clothes were two pair of shorts, two pair of sweatpants, one pair of jeans, one pair of khakis, three tee shirts, one polo, one button up shirt and one sweatshirt. Saving the majority of those for the five days of school and having a back up pair of sweatpants in the nurses office, in case of a leak- boy clothes weren't an option at home and all were handme downs anyways. The majority of the girl clothes were obviously picked out by his sisters, as he was usually too shy to pick through the handme downs in front of the girl or her parents that wore them.

It wasn't like people didn't know though. All of his sister's friends have been around the house and seen him. The occasional week where he went through too many pants so would have to wear girl jeans or sweatpants to school, or the sports. Having limited shorts and t-shirts, cheer practice was almost always done in girl shorts and t-shirts and dance was always done in handme down leotards- disregarding the design. (On a side note- this was the only time Kady was out of diapers, as they limited mobility and pullups did a fine enough job holding for the hour and a half).

Anyways, back to the point. The diapers were exclusive to him. They were fortunate enough to have a local shop that took their insurance, that had printed diapers for adults.They were originally designed for the ABDL community but Kady's mom never explained what that was to him and instead sold him on the fact that they would be a personal style choice for him. The insurance covered the cost for a certain amount of diapers and if it got close to the end of the month and they were almost out, Mrs. Yost would have to pick up a cheap package of normal diapers from the grocery store.

The trip was always done the first weekend of the month and they would go and stock up. Kady would pick out the ones that he liked but then would usually have to settle for a few packages he didn't, as the stock was out of their control. You complained but mom wasn't having it. One suggestion from your most recent doctor visit, was a new change in diet with different supplements. Any doctor suggestion, internet search, or advice- she took.

Not even 6 months ago, your mom had gotten advice from a friend of hers that was potty training her child, but like actual child- they were 2. So she had the bright idea of putting you in just pull-ups around the house, as pants added time to the potty process. Luckily she gave up on that, it was getting too much to clean up since pull-ups didn't hold as much as the diapers that she found at this medical supply store. You head up to your room- usually you have to wait for mom to change you into a new diaper but because you have practice, you wear a pull-up. They allow for more mobility and usually hold for long enough, with the rare occurrence of a leak, which you explain with spilled water or sweat. You rip off your diaper and throw it in the diaper pail, then slide up the pull-up.

Your mom had already put your football pants on top of the dresser, so you slide those up- hiding the Mickey Mouse on the front. A few years ago, there was a chance there would be a Disney Princess on the pull-ups as Kyra was still wetting the bed but fortunately she grew out of that, so you don't have to alternate on which kind mom bought.

You start looking for a tshirt to wear but you went through those during the week. You found a light blue adidas shirt that you were pretty sure Kayla got for Christmas, but it was the best that you could find. You threw it on and went over to the sock bin to find something wearable.

Socks were one of the few items of surplus in their house. It seemed that all of them had a liking for crazy socks- so this was the most popular gift for the bunch on holidays and birthdays. They were cheap and the kids loved them, so almost everyone added this along with whatever other present was bought for them. They had so many, ranging from character ankle socks to knee high fuzzy toe socks. Having so many, finding matches became a chore, so they opted to just pile them in a tub next to their dresser.

Finding socks to wear in front of the football team was normally a chore as it was because they didn't have many- but an additional practice at the end of the week made it nearly impossible. Grabbing the best option, he put on one crew sock with teal mermaid scale design and a pink crew sock with ribbons on it- he figured the guys wouldn't know about the mermaid scale design and could pass the other off as breast cancer awareness, and if all else failed he could say he grabbed two from the dryer and thought his clothes were in them.

With that, he slid on his crocs, grabbed his pads and his cleats, and began walking to practice.

They got through practice without a hiccup. After practice his friend Brett asked if he wanted to hang out. He really did but he also needed to get home and out of his now used pull-up. Brett lived far away and he would need a ride but he wasn't sure his mom would give him one. He knew Brett had a little sister who was in pull-ups, he could just try to bum a few off of her and borrow his clothes.

You barely make it into your room, when you hear running up the stares. You turn back and see Steph running up the stairs. She has been Kylie's friend ever since you could remember, even though she was older. Since she has been around forever, she has seen you in every setting, so you weren't embarrassed as she approached you.

"Dude, we have to go. Mom is outside waiting and we are going to be late." You tell her just a second since you had to pick out clothes, "Your gonna be fine, we are just having our walkthrough- coach said PJs are fine, see" she said, pointing to her pajamas that she was wearing which were white with donuts all over them.

You point down to your diaper, letting her know that you need out of that- to which she grabbed a pull-up from your dresser and told you that you could change there.

Usually, you need help changing- since the diapers aren't the easiest thing to put on yourself properly but since you wore pull-ups to sports, that should work.

Steph picks up your gym back with your shoes in it and stuffs the pull-up inside before practically dragging you to the car.

You and Steph both sit in the back seat as you say hello to her mom and thank her for the ride to practice. You guys hit every red light and train, while riding to the school- along with a bumpy detour. You kept moving your hair, as it kept getting in your eyes. While it wasn't terribly long, for guys standards it would be considered. Usually you put product in it, which kept it still but didn't have time to do so this morning. Steph noticed and told you to turn.

You did as instructed and felt her start brushing your hair. When the brush straightened out your naturally curly hair, it went to about your shoulders. All of a sudden, you felt Steph grab the hair from the top of your head and being in a house full of girls, you knew what was coming.

"You are not putting my hair in a ponytail." you say.

Normally the times you were out in public you were wearing a pull up and were worried that it would leak so you were always nervous about using them in public just in case it leaked and you were caught by others so you usually just went to the toilet or waited until you got home but this time you were wearing an actual diaper and so far nobody has realized you were a teen so feeling emboldened by this and your sister encouraging you kinda helped so you sat down and decided to use your diaper in public for the first time

Doing what you normally did when you were home alone and in one you just relaxed your mind and focused on using the diaper it takes about a minute but you are able to get a small stream going and fought your natural instinct to stop the flow from years of being potty trained and you are able to empty your bladder into the diaper

Once you were done you felt a bit of a thrill at using a diaper in public and nobody would know that you did it and if they did they wouldn't know you were a teen since everyone has mistaken you for a kid, you continued to watch the movie with your sister and when it was over you exited with her

With Kyra satisfied about the day out the two of you decided to go home now so that you can get changed and back in your normal clothes before your mother and sister return
141213112312211132.title: Use the diaper

choices: Convince her to play at home
14121311231222.content:
She raced up the stairs. She picked out a purplish/blue diaper with rocking horses and balloons on it as well as the onesie with pink flowers. "You should definitely wear this."

She then handed you your pacifier. She left the room, as you put on the diaper and onesie. You felt strange, as this would be the first time you have felt so exposed around somebody, at least intentionally.Your feet were cold, so you grabbed some adidas socks from your dresser and headed out to the kitchen, one more time- with your bottle again.

You made it to the kitchen and filled your bottle with milk and finished the milk off in your bowl of cereal. You were eating, when Kyra came out of the bathroom. She sat down next to you, while you ate and asked you what your plan was for the day. You told her that you just planned on hanging out.

She sat, watching you eat- staring at you.

"We should get ice cream or go to the mall or something." she suggested. You said that you thought she was feeling sick. She replied that she was earlier but felt better and was bored. You told her that you guys might be able to do something. That satisfied her and she went into the living room to watch tv.

You went out to the living room with her and sat on your phone, while she watched Youtube videos through the TV. After a few hours, she complained that she was bored and wanted to go do something.
14121311231222.title: The Onesie

141213112312221.content:
You figured that ice cream wouldn't hurt, as you were craving some ever since she brought it up. You told her that you were going to change and then you guys could get some.

"No, don't change." she whined.

You were confused but told her that you weren't going out in public in a onesie and a diaper.

"Aw come on, we can go to the ice cream place that we used to go to after Kayla's soccer game versus that team with the really big school- that is so far away and nobody we know will be there." she said.

You thought about it, that was like a 40 minute trip; however, you were always excited by the feeling of wearing your pull-ups to school or around people, as it gave you a rush. She was right, that nobody you knew would go that far away from home for ice cream, since there was plenty of places in your town. The more you thought about it, the more you could already feel the excitement.

"Fine," you said, "but I am at least throwing on pants over."

"No, wear the overalls, they are cute!" she said. You couldn't argue with her, as that was the more babyish option but still somewhat socially acceptable. You went upstairs, putting on the overalls- along with a white adidas hat that you found. You put that on, which you could use to cover your face if you needed to. You then put on your shoes and went to the car.
141213112312221.title: Go get ice cream

1412131123122211.content:
You arrived at the ice cream place, which had quite a few people there. From the car, you couldn't see anybody that you recognized but started to get nervous, while still kind of excited. Kyra hopped out of the car first, which prompted me to do the same. We began to approach the patio, where I saw a group of kids I figured would be in high school sitting down, enjoying their ice cream. I panicked and grabbed Kyra's hand, starting to turn back towards the car.

"What are you doing?" she asked. I explained that I couldn't do it. "Literally nobody knows you and is even paying attention to you." she tried to explain.

She ended up pulling me back towards the line. I followed, hearing the diaper crinkle every step of the way. I asked if she could hear it. "Not really" she shrugged off the question. That meant she could.

As we got in line and began talking, I started to feel more comfortable. I kept my hat low. The line moved slowly but I was thankful that the conversations of other people ended up drowning the sounds of my crinkling.

Eventually, the girl behind the counter, who again looked to be no older than me spoke up, "what can I get you girls?"

She listened to Kyra's order and then waited on mine. I started to talk after her, which caused her some confusion- as she thought I was a girl, probably due to the onesie that she assumed was a shirt. My voice hinted otherwise, but she didn't say anything.

We then went to the only available table, which was near this family and waited for our ice cream to be brought to us. Eventually, one of the workers came out and handed it to us. As we started to eat, Kyra spoke up again, "We came all the way out here, we should do something else while we are here.

You had just gotten a text from your mom that said that they had gotten to Kayla's apartment at school and it was going to take longer to unpack, so her and Kylie were probably going to stay the night there- so you had the time, the question was did you have the guts to be out in public.
1412131123122211.title: To the ice cream place

14121311231222112.content: You said fine and asked what she was thinking about, as you were hesitant to go places.
14121311231222112.title: Fine

choices: his sister (you will pick which one next)
145.content:
For months now, Kady has been posting photos and videos under a fake name on social media. It started, when he ran across a video of two girls in diapers- this led him down an ABDL rabbit hole and he found out that people got paid, gifts, and donations for wearing diapers online. He was intrigued and started a fake Tumblr site, where he offered photos for money and it took off!

He started with buying Boys Goodnites at the store and modelling them but eventually his following grew and his followers sent him actual ABDL diapers and clothing- and in return, he would send them personalized videos or put teasers out on IG, Snap, Tumblr, Twitter, etc. And as he never knows when a request will be made, he tries to be diapered up whenever he can- including overnight. Plus it prevents him from having to get up during the middle of the night to go to the bathroom.

He had his own P.O. box where stuff was shipped and while it has been a struggle, has found places to hide this stuff in his room. And nobody knows, well except
145.title: Because he is making money on social media

choices: Gifts flood in over the next two weeks
Gets bare minimum to start channel
Something happens on the way home
1451.content:
They obviously knew. And as his following grew, so did his wardrobe. He loved when they sent him gift cards, as he could buy new video games and stuff he actually wanted. He also made a little money from the platforms as well. With his wardrobe growing, he knew he needed some place to hide all of the stuff and decided with some of the money he was making, he should rent out a storage unit.

It took a couple of secret trips from his room to his car but eventually he loaded up and got a storage unit. While unloading his stuff, another idea clicked into his head- he has always heard that the real money was in YouTube- he could set this place up as a make shift nursery and start making videos there.

He quickly changed into a diaper, throwing on a onesie and putting a pacifier in his mouth. Setting up his camera stand, he took a few photos, until he got a post-worthy one. He put it on all of his social media platforms with the caption, "Finally got a space to set up a nursery for video shoots. Need donations but am really looking forward to starting up on YouTube when ready!"

You decide to keep the clothes on, taking a few more photos and videos for your followers- before throwing clothes back over top of them and heading home.
1451.title: his followers (kept a good secret)

14511.content:
As expected, the gifts flooded in to your P.O. box. It took a lot of secret trips and excuses but you spent a lot of time in that storage unit. You were able to cover the floor with multiple alphabet foam floor puzzles. The toughest part for you was putting together a crib that shipped but you were able to piece that together, attaching a mobile to it. There was a toybox in the corner, filled to the brim with kid toys. On the opposite wall, there was a changing table, stacked with diapers.

Hanging from the ceiling, you placed a hammock which contained a bunch of stuffed animals. Your had a dresser, which was full of clothes that your followers had sent you. And you had a rolling rack, where dresses were hung up, full from one end to the other.

They even sent you a new laptop and camera, which you set up in the corner of the room, so that everything was visable. You were able to hook it up, so that you could live stream sessions. You decided to stream on twitch too and stole an idea from your favorite gamers, when somebody donated a certain amount- the computer would read their comment- giving them the ability to "parent" you. You had a feeling that you were going to make a lot of money.

You took a picture of the completed nursery (although you were still receiving things daily to put in there) with an explanation of your plan. Streamers could watch on youtube, which paid per visitor. But you also sent out a link to your twitch channel, which also had content of you playing video games and talked about the donation feature, setting the price at $50 per comment but could obviously donate less or become a subscriber- different tiers costing different amounts.
14511.title: Gifts flood in over the next two weeks

choices: Woke up to banging on storage unit
145111.content:
You had a Saturday off, so Friday night you told your mom that you were going over to a friends for the night. You left the house after dinner and headed to your storage unit. You made sure to add a padlock on the inside, so you locked yourself inside, changing into a Rearz Safari and then put on a pair of blue footed pajamas with cupcakes all over it.

You logged on to the computer a posted that you were going to start your first live stream and to celebrate, it was going to be a 24 hour live stream. You clipped a pacifier to your pajamas and started the stream. Since you posted about it a few days earlier, some of your loyal followers were already joining in. After you saw it was working, you headed over to the toy box and sat down. You grabbed a few blocks and started to make a tower, when suddenly your computer made a noise.

The robotic voice started to read a comment, "Show daddy what diaper you are wearing." You walked over to the laptop and saw that you had gathered a bunch of smaller donations but that somebody just made a $50 one. You stood infront of the laptop and unzipped your onesie and revealed your diaper before putting it back on.

That one comment, led to a frenzy of comments. Comments were coming in so fast, you were struggling to do everything- they ranged from showing off your nursery to getting into seductive poses. This went on for hours. Eventually, it was two in the morning and you were exhausted. You hadn't had a comment in about 15 minutes so you walked over to the camera and told them it was bedtime- you planned to keep live streaming but needed a quick nap. You put your pajamas back on, since you were in a dressup dress as instructed by one of your followers earlier.

You looked at your laptop to make sure it was still working. There had been 38 comments, which put you close to $2000 for tonight alone. That didn't include the subscribers or the smaller donations just for the sake of donating. Your plan was working.

You climbed into the crib with a bottle and stuffed animal, raising the side of the crib. You started the mobile and closed your eyes. You were really excited but also exhausted, so you fell asleep.
145111.title: First Stream

1451112.content:
You woke up, laying in your crib. You were a little cramped, as the crib size was a downgrade from your normal bed- albeit not a huge downgrade, as you only had a twin size bed at your house. You had to tuck your legs to fit, so you sat up. Noticing the bottle, you were thirsty so you began to drink.

Eventually, the water was gone and you wanted to stretch your legs. You slid down the side of the crib and climbed out, stumbling. You laid on the ground and sprawled out, making yourself as stretch out as possible. You felt the urge to pee, so you let it go.

You got back up and headed towards your laptop. There were three paid comments in the middle of the night, that went unfulfilled- as you were sleeping. They more or less just wanted you to wake up and to see your diaper. You scrolled through some of the Youtube live comments, as they weren't paid. Most of them were complimenting you or telling people what they should tell you to do.

You went over to your diaper bag and pulled out the box of pop-tarts that you brought for breakfast. You opened the package and scarfed a few of them down, before heading over to your toy box. There were a couple children puzzles that you decided to open and take a crack at. Overall, it was a fairly relaxing morning- you realized you weren't getting the traffic you were during the night.
1451112.title: Just woke up

14511121.content:
"Good morning baby, lets see your diaper..." the computer read. A new comment came through. You headed over to the camera and unzipped your jammies, revealing your wet diaper. You kept the pajamas off and headed back to your puzzles.

"Uh-Oh, baby needs a change. Change into a new diaper and dress." the computer read again, from the same subscriber. You walked over to the changing table and grabbed a new diaper, this time a Rearz Rebel that was laying on top. Normally you wouldn't change out of the old diaper, as it wasn't filled to capacity so seemed like a waste; however, you now had a ton so you didn't feel too bad about it. You laid on the changing table and removed your old diaper and replaced it with the new one. You bagged the old one and placed it in the trash can that you had brought.

You then walked over to the rack and grabbed one of the dresses hanging. You were not an expert on dresses so you just grabbed one.You assumed that this had to be an abdl specific thing, as there was a ton of frills, ruffles, laces, and bows. You put it on.

"Spin as fast as you can so daddy can see!" the computer read, again from the same person. You started to spin, really fast until you felt yourself getting dizzy. You felt the dress fly up, which was what you assumed the person wanted.

The man kept commenting, starting with little stuff like bending over and progressed to using your diaper and letting him see. For the next few hours, this person dropped nearly $1000 himself on request and demands. You were down for whatever though, as $3000 a weekend was a pretty good deal.
14511121.title: New comment gets read

choices: Decide to AMA with youtube comments
145111212.content:
Eventually the person stopped commenting, leaving you to go back to playing with your stuff. Lunch came, so you ate the sandwich that you packed. Again, it became fairly boring- as people weren't on as much as they were yesterday.

You decide that the 24 hour stream may only be a once in a while thing, although as you found out this morning- you can make money quickly in a matter of few hours.
145111212.title: Person stops commenting

choices: Wake up to banging on storage unit
1451112122.content: With still 5 hours left, you decide that a nap is the way to go. You change out of the dress and just throw a onesie on over the diaper. You climbed back into the crib and eventually fell asleep.
1451112122.title: Nap time

1452.title: his sister (you will pick which one next)

14522.content:
One of your followers requested you send them a video in a school girls uniform, and they paid you big money. So one day, when you thought you were home alone- you snuck into Kylie and Kyra's room, only to see Kylie sitting on her bed- looking at you confused.

Not really sure what to do, you just confessed everything and when she didn't believe you, you showed her proof. She already thought you were a weirdo, but this was over the top. You begged her not to say anything, in which she asked what was in it for her. You negotiated a deal, where she would get a little money from your business venture but in turn would offer up whatever clothes you needed and would even hide some of the more fashionable girl clothes that your fans sent you. She would even record some of the videos, if extra hands were required.

While it wasn't ideal, it was a pretty good deal. And it was nice to have somebody to talk to about it.

One morning...
14522.title: Kylie

1452231.content:
Your mom walk in and you quickly make sure you are covered. "Honey, there is somebody at the door that needs to talk to you." You make out the words that she is saying but are more concerned whether or not she saw your diaper.

"Why didn't you knock?" you asked.

"I did and I said your name but you didn't respond, so I had to unlock the door and come get you." she responded.

You did have a pretty late night but that still doesn't excuse her from violating your privacy I mean the door was locked. Did she see you?
1452231.title: Your Mom

14522311.content:
"So hurry up, get out of that diaper and put some clothes on- we will talk about that later"

You feel flush with embarrassment but get up and change as soon as she leaves the room. You rip the diaper off and put it in the trash can in your closet. You use some wipes, hoping to get the smell off and then throw on a pair of shorts and a shirt.

Downstairs, you see
14522311.title: She did

14522312.content:
Put on some clothes and come down stairs. You don't think she saw you and as soon as she left, you threw on some music. This is one thing you did to try to silence the sound of ripping the tabs off, you folded the diaper and threw it in the trash you had hidden in your closet. You usually sneak out and take that out in the morning but it was going to have to wait. You wiped yourself down with some wipes, hoping it disguises the smell that is usually washed away by your morning shower.

You threw on some shorts and a shirt and went to the living room. You saw
14522312.title: She didn't

choices: I want in on the deal, I need money
You are going to be my baby
14522331.content:
It was Steph, who has been around you ever since she was little. She was one grade older than Kylie but they used to be on the same dance and cheer teams before Kylie quit. Now she is a freshman cheerleader, cheering for your football team. She comes over to your bed and rips off the covers, exposing your diaper.

"Oh my God," she says laughing hysterically. "I thought that was you" she continues. "I was looking through Kylie's IG when I saw she followed somebody that looked like you but was under a different name and when I checked out the posts I couldn't believe it so I had to check."

"How did you even get in here, the door was locked?" I asked, trying to stall to gather my thoughts.

She holds up her bobby pin, "this isn't a bank vault, we have the same locks on our doors inside"

"Now, here's what's going to happen..."
14522331.title: Kylie's BFF

choices: Just don't tell and I'll get you whatever you want
14523.content: Kyra walked in on you, when you were skyping one of your followers. She stared for a minute out of disbelief and you stared back. It couldn't be hard to explain your way out of this, she was only in fourth grade.
14523.title: Kyra
